ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "food_type" TEXT /* Type of food served (e.g., American, Italian) */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range */,
  "cuisine_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cuisine */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city_name FOREIGN KEY ("city_name") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating given by the user */,
  "service_rating" REAL /* Rating specifically for the service */,
  "food_rating" REAL /* Rating specifically for the food */,
  "ambiance_rating" REAL /* Rating specifically for the ambiance */,
  "value_rating" REAL /* Rating specifically for the value for money */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the user has written */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)
column_names: Type of food served (e.g., American, Italian)
City where the restaurant is located
Contact phone number for the restaurant
Date and time when the restaurant information was last updated
ID of the restaurant being reviewed
